data.title: Garmin Ltd. schedules first quarter 2026 earnings call
data.description: In Schaffhausen, Switzerland, Garmin Ltd. (NYSE: GRMN) has announced that it will host its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call on April 29, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. EDT, led by Garmin executives. Shareholders and investors are encouraged to participate in this event.

data.title: Pelican Announces Global Partnership with Renowned Explorer and Photographer Chris Burkard
data.description: In honor of its 50th anniversary, Pelican, the top provider of protective solutions worldwide, is introducing the "Case Chronicles" series and embarking on a year-long partnership. Based in TORRANCE, Calif., the company announced this initiative on March 25, 2026, through PRNewswire. Through this series, Pelican aims to showcase its leading protective products while collaborating with partners throughout the year.

data.title: Maximo Completes 100 MW of Robotic Solar Installation
data.description: Maximo, a solar robotics company incubated by The AES Corporation, headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, achieved a significant milestone on March 25, 2026. This milestone signifies one of the most extensive robotic solar deployments completed to date. The company successfully installed a staggering 100 megawatts (MW) of solar energy, demonstrating their commitment to advancing renewable energy technologies. This accomplishment highlights the company’s expertise in innovative solar solutions and their impact on the industry.

data.title: ENNOVI Secures German Patent Approval for Adhesive-Free Lamination in Battery Cell Contacting Systems
data.description: ENNOVI, a prominent global company in e-mobility interconnects based in NECKARSULM, Germany, revealed on March 25, 2026, the launch of a verified CCS design pathway. This advancement aims to decrease uncertainty levels for prudent battery engineers. As an established engineering collaborator within the automotive sector, ENNOVI's new CCS design pathway offers a reliable solution. This initiative is set to provide guidance and assurance to battery engineers, further solidifying the company's position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Creator TV® and Convergence Announce Partnership to Bring Creator-Led Programming to Television
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Sabio Holdings (TSXV: SBIO) (OTCQB: SABOF) disclosed a new partnership for its network, Creator TV®, with Convergence, a Los Angeles entity specializing in creator management, media development, and venture opportunities. The collaboration aims to enhance content and expand strategic initiatives.

data.title: Pacific Defense Launches Next-Generation AI-Enabled Digital Signal Processor for Next-Generation Mission Systems
data.description: Pacific Defense unveiled the DSP3100VP, a new digital signal processing module designed to introduce cutting-edge artificial intelligence and machine learning features to edge computing. Developed on the AMD Versal™ AI Edge Series Gen 2 adaptive SoC, the DSP3100VP integrates various compute capabilities, adaptive acceleration, and real-time control to cater to the increasing need for smart, data-centric technologies in defense.

data.title: Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan, Inc. Announce Extension of Second Open Season for Remaining Western Gateway Capacity
data.description: Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan, Inc. have jointly declared an extension of the second open season for the Western Gateway Pipeline in Houston. This move aims to further enhance the capacity and reach of the pipeline system and facilitate increased transportation of oil and gas products. The extension presents interested parties with an extended window to participate in the open season for this crucial infrastructure project. The pipeline extension is intended to significantly boost the transportation capacity in the region and support the growth of the energy sector. This announcement signifies a strategic step towards strengthening the energy transportation network.

data.title: KNOT Offshore Partners LP Earnings Release—interim Results for the Period Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: In Aberdeen, Scotland, KNOT Offshore Partners LP (NYSE: KNOP) released its financial highlights for the fourth quarter of 2025. During this period, the Partnership generated total revenues amounting to $96.5 million. Their operating income stood at $8.4 million, but they experienced a net loss of $6.2 million after recording a $20.3 million non-cash impairment related to the Bodil Knutsen vessel. This adjustment was made to provide a clearer view of operational performance without the impact of the impairment.

data.title: GridCARE and National Grid Collaborate to Unlock Grid Capacity for Infrastructure
data.description: In Redwood City, California, GridCARE, a company expediting time-to-power for AI, and National Grid (NYSE: NGG) have partnered to expedite the connection of large-load customers to the power grid and cut costs for new infrastructure. This collaboration is crucial as utilities are experiencing a notable increase in demands for new large loads due to the resurgence of manufacturing and the global growth of AI infrastructure. For instance, data center developers regularly encounter delays due to the high demand for power connectivity.

data.title: TRX price forecast: Aims $0.32 breakout by April '26. TRON at $0.31, RSI 64.38 neutral. Predicts rise to $0.32 if support at $0.30 holds.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TRON is currently priced at $0.31, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 64.38. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a breakout to the $0.32 resistance level within the next 4-6 weeks, provided that the current consolidation remains above the $0.30 support level.

data.title: Litecoin price aims to hit $60 by April 2026, currently trading at $56.44 with resistance at $57.73. Support crucial at...
data.description: Litecoin is currently trading at $56.44, displaying a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and facing key resistance at $57.73. Technical analysis indicates that if bulls manage to surpass the current levels, Litecoin could potentially aim for a range between $60 to $62. It is crucial for critical support to be maintained at this level to sustain the upward momentum.

data.title: BCH may hit $495 by April with bullish momentum near $480 resistance. Technicals hint at breakout if $472 support holds.
data.description: Bitcoin Cash is currently demonstrating bullish momentum as it approaches the $480 resistance level. Analysts predict that BCH may climb to the range of $495-$500 in the next 2-3 weeks, provided that the current support level at $472 is maintained.

data.title: NEAR Protocol price may hit $1.46 by April 2026, currently at $1.30 with $1.32 key level for potential uptrend. (Read More)
data.description: The trading price of NEAR Protocol stands at $1.30, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Technical analysis indicates a possible upward shift towards the $1.46 upper Bollinger Band if buyers can regain control above the $1.32 mark.

data.title: Merck to Acquire Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc., Expanding Its Hematology Pipeline With TERN-701, a Novel Candidate for Chronic Myeloid Leukemia (CML)
data.description: TERN-701, the primary candidate of Terns Pharmaceuticals, is undergoing Phase 1/2 trials. This drug is an experimental oral allosteric BCR::ABL1 tyrosine kinase inhibitor designed for specific patients with Chronic Myeloid Leukemia (CML).

data.title: Argus launches first Brazilian natural gas market price assessments
data.description: In an effort to increase transparency in the gas sector, a leading energy and commodity price reporting agency, Argus, has introduced the initial daily assessed price for Brazil's natural gas spot market. This move comes after Brazil recently opened up its natural gas market. The new daily price assessment is a significant step towards enhancing visibility and efficiency in the country's gas market. The launch is indicative of the growing importance of Brazil in the global energy landscape, highlighting the country's potential as a key player in the natural gas industry. This development provides market participants with crucial pricing information, facilitating better decision-making and fostering competition within the sector. It signifies a positive shift towards a more open and competitive gas market in Brazil.
